patches.hypothesis: The original patch only corrected the specific issue with BigDecimal but did not address other numeric types. The refined patch will handle all numeric types appropriately, including null checks and boundary conditions.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by calling visitFloatFormat with JsonParser.NumberType.BIG_INTEGER instead of JsonParser.NumberType.BIG_DECIMAL for BigDecimal class. The fix involves changing the NumberType to BIG_DECIMAL when handling BigDecimal.
